title: Shower Services
author: ryan@faceless.media
content:
Home

Shower Install | Chicago, IL

If your bungalow or flat needs Shower Install in Chicago, IL, contact Plumbers 911 to resolve your issues quickly.

Whether you're looking to rehab a house in South Deering or a condo in Lincoln Park, Plumbers 911 can put you in touch with top plumbing professionals for a shower install in Chicago. We're a 24/7 referral service that provides clients with a selection of licensed and insured plumbers who are experienced in all aspects of the trade. Contact Plumbers 911 at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to connect with a provider in your area.

Why You Might Need Shower Installation Services

You may need a minor shower repair, such as fresh caulking, faucet replacement or drain cleaning. Our network affiliates are more than capable of handling any bathroom plumbing project, including a complete shower replacement. Whether you've discovered a leak behind your shower wall or have simply decided that the area requires a total update, Plumbers 911 provides you with the most skilled plumbing professionals to perform a full shower installation.

Or, if you're just looking to turn your bathroom into a relaxing oasis, our contractors are equipped to install a comprehensive range of modern shower amenities, including spa-like jets, rainfall shower heads, steam systems and innovative temperature control faucets. When you contact Plumbers 911, we furnish you with the top-rated professionals who are highly trained in all shower repair and shower replace areas. They're available to manage emergencies 24/7, and they'll arrange an installation that's convenient for you.

Shower Installation Services in Chicago

When you require a shower install in Chicago Plumbers 911 is the resource you need. As a plumbing referral service, our thorough vetting system ensures that you receive a selection of only the top-rated professionals in your area. The plumbers included in our network are fully licensed, bonded and insured. They're also highly trained in all aspects of plumbing repair and installation. 

Each plumber we include on our referral list is dedicated to finding the most effective and efficient solution for your unique situation. Whether you need a repair or replacement, our plumbers walk you through each step of the process. In the event that you decide on a complete shower installation, they'll offer advice on choosing the appropriate finishes and evaluate suitable types of showerheads and faucets. Our plumbing professionals offer a high degree of reliability. 

They'll accurately assess the job requirements and provide you with a reasonable timeline to complete the project. Respectful of your home, they protect surrounding surfaces and maintain cleanliness while installing showers. The contractors perform a final walk-through at the end of each project to ensure they've removed all debris.

Hire a Chicago Plumber Today

The Plumbers 911 selection process is comprehensive. Each of the professionals we include in our network is required to hold the appropriate licensure and insurance. Additionally, we require routine drug testing for all of the plumbers in our network.

Because we value our clients, our interactions begin and end with a commitment to customer service. We also expect our affiliates to deliver the same dedication to quality service. The contractors available through the Plumbers 911 network are local to the areas they serve. As members of the community, they take responsibility for providing their neighbors with an honest assessment of the situation.

Local professionals also possess the necessary insight into any potential issues they may encounter. Our plumbing professionals are available 24/7 to handle emergencies, and they can arrange convenient schedules for any type of routine maintenance. Whether you require plumbing repair, drain cleaning or a full-scale shower installation, Plumbers 911 delivers a network of the area's top-rated professionals. Contact us at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) for immediate assistance with finding a solution to your plumbing needs.

 

Shower Services Cost in Chicago

Typical cost: $1,500-$5,000+ depending on type (shower replacement, new shower installation, custom tile shower plumbing). Call 833-758-6911 for a free estimate.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you install a shower where there wasn't one before?

Yes, we can install new showers by running supply and drain lines to the new location. This is common in basement finishes and bathroom additions. Permits are required in Chicago.

What's involved in shower valve replacement?

Shower valve replacement involves accessing the valve behind the wall, removing the old valve, installing the new one, and testing for proper temperature mixing and pressure. Most replacements take 2-4 hours.

Do you install rain showerheads and body sprays?

Yes, we install all types of shower fixtures including rain showerheads, body sprays, handheld showers, and multi-head systems. Some installations require upgraded water supply lines for adequate pressure.

Call Plumbers 911 Chicago at 833-758-6911 for a free estimate. Licensed, bonded, and insured. Available 24/7.

title: Bathtub Services
author: ryan@faceless.media
content:
Home

Bathtub Install | Chicago, IL

If your bungalow or flat needs Bathtub Install in Chicago, IL, contact Plumbers 911 to resolve your issues quickly.

There have never been more options when it comes to creating the bathroom of your dreams. Whether it's a master en suite or a family bathroom, we all want function combined with luxurious finishes and a calm ambience. Bathtubs have become an important part of contemporary bathroom design. But installing major items such as a bathtub is definitely not a DIY proposition. 

Fortunately, when you need a bathtub install in Chicago Plumbers 911 is here to help. Plumbers 911 provides fast and easy access to the local plumbing professionals best suited to your task at hand. All over the greater Chicago area, Plumbers 911 connects home and business owners with plumbers who offer an extensive menu of services, including emergency calls, scheduled maintenance and repair, and replacement and installation services. 

For added peace of mind, all the professionals in our network are fully licensed and insured. When you find yourself in need of help with bathtub repair or install, call Plumbers 911 at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911), and we'll connect you with a trusted professional to address your bathtub installation needs.

Why You Might Need Bathtub Installation

There are many reasons you might need a bathtub install in Chicago. Tubs don't last forever and may become structurally unsound or covered with scratches and pit marks. New styles are always coming on the market, and it may be that your existing bathroom setup could use a refresh with an elegant stand-alone model or soaker tub. 

Or it could be time to design the spa-like retreat of your dreams for personal pampering. There are also resale value considerations. Luxurious bathrooms that feature an updated bathtub are considered an asset. For any or all of these reasons, a pristine new bathtub should be a major part of any bathroom update. 

If you already have a bathtub that you love, consider repairs or fixture replacements that can create a new look without major disruptions. Plumbers 911 can also help with bathtub repairs or renovations that don't require major household disruptions or investment in a brand new tub.

Bathtub Installation Services in Chicago

Tubs come in many shapes, sizes and profiles, each with a slightly different installation process. That's why having a plumbing professional on board for your bathtub installation is infinitely more sensible than going the DIY route. Installing a new tub usually involves taking out the old one, a laborious task that involves disconnecting pipes and drains as well as carefully disposing of the old tub. 

The new tub must be installed and hooked up to existing piping according to the regional building code. If you live in an older home, you already know that plumbing infrastructure is not always straightforward. A plumber will make sure the new bathtub replacement doesn't put new burdens on your plumbing system and cause water damage. 

Depending on what style of tub is being installed, installation may also involve tiling, sealing and waterproofing the immediate area. If your new free-standing tub is made from heavier materials such as stone or cast iron, there may also be engineering concerns. Working with a professional plumber, however will ensure seamless integration with the other trades required for the job.

Hire a Chicago Plumber Today

Having the right plumbing professional around when it's time to remodel your bathroom with a new bathtub can save you from some headaches and also save you money. A job done right the first time is always more economical than quick fixes or DIY solutions gone wrong. 

If you live in the Chicago area and are looking for skilled help with a bathtub install, give Plumbers 911 a call at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911). We'll connect you to a licensed plumber who will replace your old tub safely and securely, bringing you one step closer to your dream bathroom.

Bathtub Services Cost in Chicago

Typical cost: $1,000-$5,000+ depending on type (standard replacement, tub-to-shower conversion, freestanding, whirlpool). Call 833-758-6911 for a free estimate.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you convert my bathtub to a walk-in shower?

Yes, bathtub-to-shower conversions are one of our most popular services. We handle all plumbing modifications including drain relocation, supply line adjustments, and valve installation.

How long does bathtub installation take?

A straightforward replacement typically takes 1-2 days for plumbing work. Conversions or new installations requiring pipe rerouting may take 2-3 days.

Do I need a permit for bathtub installation in Chicago?

Yes, plumbing permits are typically required in Chicago for bathtub installations, especially if drain lines are being modified. We handle all permit applications and inspections.

Call Plumbers 911 Chicago at 833-758-6911 for a free estimate. Licensed, bonded, and insured. Available 24/7.

title: Shower Services
author: Alex@faceless.media
content:
Home

Shower Install | Arlington Heights, IL

For expert shower installation in Arlington Heights, call Plumbers 911 at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911).

Where do residents of the most populous village in the United States go for a night out? The odds are at least some of those 75,000-plus people will head to the Metropolis Performance Arts Center. Whether you're attending a Shakespearean play, a contemporary dance or musical show, or even cheering on your child in a school performance, you'll want to look your best. 

Part of your preparations will undoubtedly include taking a hot shower. If your shower isn't as hot as you'd like, or the pressure isn't as strong as it should be, it might be time to consider getting a new one.

Whether you need to repair or replace a shower that isn't performing or you just feel it's time for an upgrade, Plumbers 911 can put you in touch with the best local professional to help you choose the right option for you. They'll get the installation done with minimum fuss and maximum satisfaction. Call 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) today.

Why You Might Need Shower Installation Services

If you're unhappy with your shower, it could be time for a new one if you notice these signs:

  • The shower head is leaking
  • The water pressure is poor
  • You worry about young children hurting themselves with water that is too hot
  • The bathroom is need of an upgrade, or you're adding an extra shower

There are many choices available when it comes to finding new features and fittings for your next shower. For example, a thermostatically-controlled unit that regulates the maximum temperature could help prevent scalds. A detachable shower head, a rainfall unit or a steam shower might be just the thing for soothing your tired muscles and frayed nerves. Perhaps you'd like to do your bit for the planet by installing a water-saver unit. 

Before making a decision, it's always a good idea to seek the advice of a professional before spending a lot of money on the wrong option. For safety and peace of mind, shower installation and shower replacement are jobs best left to competent professionals.

Shower Installation Services in Arlington Heights

When Plumbers 911 refers you to a local, fully bonded, licensed and insured professional, you know you'll be in good hands. They will discuss your needs, preferences and budget with you, then help you decide which of more than 12 types of shower heads will work best for you. They'll advise you on other aspects of your upgrade, as well; for example, whether a curbless shower would suit your space. The plumber will determine what changes need to be made in gas and water pipe and drainage routing and choose the right fittings. Then they'll do the work with minimum disruption.

title: Bathtub Services
author: Alex@faceless.media
content:
Home

Bathtub Install | Arlington Heights, IL

Do you need a new bathtub installed? For professional service and peace of mind, call Plumbers 911 at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911).

Arlington Heights, IL, has quite a movie history. Most notably, John Hersey High School was used for some scenes in the 2010 remake of A Nightmare on Elm Street. If you're looking for a bathtub installation in Arlington Heights, you can avoid a possible nightmare of your own by hiring a qualified plumber to get the job done right.

Give Plumbers 911 a call at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911), and we'll use our network of trustworthy local professionals to find the right plumber near you. A new bathtub is an investment, so you should ensure the installation is done by someone with the knowledge and skill to do the job correctly.

Why You Might Need Bathtub Installation

Do any of these things apply to you?

  • A growing family means your one bathtub is no longer enough
  • Your aging bathtub is in desperate need of a facelift
  • Your bathtub is too short or shallow for comfort
  • The surface of your tub is scratched and worn from years of use
  • You're longing for a little more luxury — perhaps a spa bath

If so, it's time to install a new tub for your bathroom. A bathtub isn't just an investment in comfort; it can add dollars to the value of your home. That's why it's best to get a professional to do the work. In addition to the new tub, it may be necessary to install new plumbing or repair existing plumbing. Issues can arise with incompatible fittings or drain and water pipe connections. If the work isn't done to a high standard or fails to meet the required building codes, you may not reap the maximum increase in property value for the remodel.

Bathtub Installation Services in Arlington Heights

Whether you're installing a new style of tub or just replacing an old one, it's not a job to attempt yourself. Water leakage due to amateur plumbing work can lead to unpleasant and expensive problems. When it comes time to connect your new bathtub, a professional plumber referred by Plumbers 911 will ensure the parts used are the right ones and are correctly fitted. 

The professional plumber will carry out any required modifications to existing plumbing or install your new pipes and drain in accordance with the relevant building codes.  An experienced and competent plumber can advise you on the best course of action based on your wishes and budget and carry out the work safely and efficiently.
